sys_script_include.description: This file was created to handle Organicational Hierarchy ACLs for the Tasker App. Tech Debt - TODO - other ACLs for OU should move in here even if they all use the UserInfoScripts 2.8.3 | 2023-06-20 - raj - DFCT0012030 - With Organizational Privacy turned On ~ GHA user in a Private Structure cannot add Sub OU. (It should be allowed) 2.8.3 | 2023-06-20- raj - DFCT0012031 - With Organizational Privacy turned On ~ GHA user in a Private Structure cannot Top Organizational Unit. (It should be allowed) 2.8.3 | 2023-06-16 - raj - DFCT0012016 - With Organizational Privacy turned On ~ Users in a Private Structure SHOULD view External OU, but they DO NOT appear in the list 2.8.3 | 2023-06-06 - raj - DFCT0011930 - Global Hierarchy Admins in a Private OU can see and modify all OUs even open OUs. The Private OUs cannot be seen by users in an Open OU (good thing) 2.8.x | 2023-05-07 | raj | DFCT0011813 - Set the Organizational Privacy to "Organization is Open", on change the "Set as External OU" is disabled. This SHOULD NOT be disabled. 2.8.x | 2023-05-01 | raj |DFCT0011804 - TAA ~Organization Hierarchy Tree Bi-Fold Form~ unable to click "External OU" checkbox in platform view ~ unable to change Organizational Privacy field platform 2.8.x | 2023-05-01 | raj |DFCT0011800 - TAA > click > Organizational Hierarchy Tree Bi-Fold . ERROR DISPLAY (or any ATF users) 2.8.x | 2023-04-30 - raj - STRY0139319 - Removed the toast warning, and just disabled fields that can't be changed 2.8.x | 2023-04-16 | raj | STRY0138378 - Enable Hierarchy Admins to Enable/Disable Private Settings for their OU 2.8.x | 2023-04-16 | raj |STRY0138377 - Only Members of Private org structure can view the org structure.
sys_script_include.name: OrganizationalHierarchyACLs
